title: Vanilla Rabbits Plus
description: This resource pack aims to improve rabbits while staying true to Minecraft's art style. Requires Optifine/Entity Model Features/etc.
body:
This resource pack aims to improve rabbits while staying true to Minecraft's art style. Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)/[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/version/bwjbN1G7)/etc.

This pack was inspired by Mojang's redesigns of bats and vexes, and follows suit by:

- Making rabbits pixel consistent
- Making them visually simpler to better fit their small size
- Keeping their general appearance and shape close to vanilla, despite the above changes.

Model made by me in Blockbench, textures edited from Mojang's by me.
